KILLSTREAKS_AERIAL_ASSAULT_DESC: A small, manually piloted, aerial drone with a high explosive charge that can be detonated on command.
KILLSTREAKS_AERIAL_PLACED_MINES_DESC: Be the gunner of a bombing aircraft that fires mines onto the map.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRDROP_JUGGERNAUT_DESC: Receive advanced armor via Care Package.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRDROP_JUGGERNAUT_RECON_DES: Receive advanced armor via Care Package.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRDROP_TEAM_AMMO_DESC: Resupply team ammo via Care Package.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRDROP_TRAP_DESC: Kill enemies with a booby-trapped airdrop crate.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_COOP_DESC: A teammate can join the bomber on a second missile turret.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_FLARES_DESC: Add ability to shoot flares to ward off enemy missiles.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_PACKAGE_DESC: Drop care packages instead of bombs close to the chosen site.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_PLAYER_DESC: Control a missile turret on the wing of the airstrike.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_SPEED_DESC: Decrease the speed of the airstrike and drop even more bombs.
KILLSTREAKS_AIRSTRIKE_STEALTH_DESC: Airstrike is hidden on the enemy radar.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_AI_DESC: Adds the option for AI control of the drone.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_ARHUD_DESC: Adds augmented reality HUD for target acquisition.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_CLOAK_DESC: Adds the ability for the drone to cloak.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_HARDENED_DESC: Increases drone health but decreases movement speed.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_MG_DESC: Adds a machine gun turret on the drone.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_ROCKETS_DESC: Adds a rocket launcher onto the drone.
KILLSTREAKS_ASSAULT_DRONE_UAV_DESC: A small, manually piloted, aerial drone with a high explosive charge that can be detonated on command.
KILLSTREAKS_DEPLOYABLE_AMMO_DESC: Deploy an ammo box for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_DEPLOYABLE_EXP_AMMO_DESC: Deploy an Explosive Ammo box for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_DEPLOYABLE_VEST_DESC: Deploy a bag of Ballistic Vests for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_DIRECTIONAL_UAV_DESC: Call a UAV that shows where your enemy is facing.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_DESC: Have a drone deliver a care package.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_FAST_DESC: Drone will build the carepackage faster.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_HIDE_DESC: Care package does not appear on enemy radar.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_ODDS_DESC: Increase the chance of getting better items.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_RELEASE: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to release package early
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_ROLL_DESC: Allow double tap to change the package contents.
KILLSTREAKS_DRONE_CAREPACKAGE_TRAP_DESC: Once captured by your team the package will be rebuilt to explode if the enemy team tries to capture it.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_ASSIST_DESC: Earn assist points for teammate kills.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_DESC: An autonomous cyber attack that disables enemy HUD, radar, and reticles.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_EQUIPMENT_DISABLE_DESC: Kills all active enemy electronic-based equipment and disables its usage for the duration of the device.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_EXO_DISABLE_DESC: Disables the usage of exo movement for the duration of the device.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_FLASH_DESC: Flashbangs all enemies for a short time.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_STREAK_DISABLE_DESC: Kills all active enemy scorestreaks and disables their usage for the duration of the device.
KILLSTREAKS_EMP_TIME_DESC: Increase the amount of time the device is active.
KILLSTREAKS_EXPLOSIVE_AMMO_DESC: Swaps out your rounds for Explosive Ammo.
KILLSTREAKS_GL_TURRET_DESC: Place and man a Grenade Launcher Turret.
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_DESC: A manually piloted suit of advanced armor with heavy weapons.
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_EJECT_DESC: Automatically eject when the suit is damaged; suit will seek and destroy.
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_MANIAC_DESC: Trade your primary weapon for speed, exo movement, and a spike drone.
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_PICKUP: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to enter Goliath
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_RADAR_DESC: Equips Goliath with a rechargeable Exo Ping device.
KILLSTREAKS_HEAVY_EXO_ROCKETS_DESC: Rocket pack on shoulder that can shoot multiple missiles on a locked target.
KILLSTREAKS_IMS_DESC: The Intelligent Munitions System detects and eliminates enemy combatants.
KILLSTREAKS_MAP_KILLSTREAK_DESC:
Unique map based scorestreak. 
Score Cost: Unique Per Map.
KILLSTREAKS_MISSILE_STRIKE_CHEM_DESC: Primary missile leaves behind a swarm of Nanobots.
KILLSTREAKS_MISSILE_STRIKE_CLUSTER_DESC: Primary missile splits into multiple spiraling missiles for concentrated area damage.
KILLSTREAKS_MISSILE_STRIKE_DRONE_DESC: Each missile drops an explosive drone.
KILLSTREAKS_MISSILE_STRIKE_EXTRA_DESC: Adds an additional single target missile to fire.
KILLSTREAKS_MISSILE_STRIKE_HELLFIRE_DESC: Primary missile splits into multiple targeting missiles.
KILLSTREAKS_MOBILE_MORTAR_DESC: Call in defendable mortar ground support.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_DAM_DESC: Take control of the Dam Rail Guns.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_INSTINCT_DESC: Activate a pack of Attack Dogs that will guard the player and attack nearby enemy threats.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_LAB2: Local Security Network Threat Detection System
KILLSTREAKS_MP_RECOVERY: Super Exo Suit for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_RECOVERY_DESC: Super Exo Suit for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_RECREATION_DESC: Hover the swarm over enemies to cause damage.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_REFRACTION_DESC: Turrets pop up from underneath the deck
KILLSTREAKS_MP_SOLAR_DESC: Take control of the Solar Focusing Tower.
KILLSTREAKS_MP_TORQUED_DESC: Activate nuclear fusion cell that cooks enemies that are in line of sight.
KILLSTREAKS_NEXT_GEN_EXO_DESC: Download additional perks to your exo suit.
KILLSTREAKS_NEXT_GEN_EXO_PICKUP: Press and hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to upgrade Exo.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_AMMO_DESC: Time to reload turrets is shorter.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_COOP_DESC: Joining player mounts additional MG Turret. Replaces default ability.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_DESC: A manually controlled weapon system aboard an orbiting Paladin gunship.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_FLARES_DESC: Add an extra flare to ward off more enemy missiles.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_ROCKETS_DESC: Add a turret that fires laser guided rockets.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITALSUPPORT_TIME_DESC: Increase the amount of time in the air.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_AR_HUD_D: Adds augmented reality HUD to display enemies when dropping the care package.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_DESC: A Care Package called in from orbit containing a random Scorestreak that has a chance of being the map streak.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_DRONE_DE: Adds thrusters allowing it to seek you out before landing.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_FAST_DES: Pick up your own care package faster.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_HIDE_DES: Care package does not appear on enemy radar.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_MODULE_D: The reward in your care package will include a random module for it.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_ODDS_DES: Increase the chance of getting better items.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_ROLL_DES: Allow double tap to change the package contents.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_CAREPACKAGE_TRAP_DES: The package will explode if the enemy team tries to capture it.
KILLSTREAKS_ORBITAL_STRIKE_DESC: A manually controlled burst of high-powered directed energy deployed from space.
KILLSTREAKS_OSPREY_GUNNER_DESC: Be the gunner of an Osprey delivering several Care Packages.
KILLSTREAKS_RECON_UGV_AR_HUD_DESC: Adds augmented reality HUD for target acquisition.
KILLSTREAKS_RECON_UGV_ASSIST_POINTS_DESC: Marking players grants extra assist points.
KILLSTREAKS_RECON_UGV_DESC: A small, manually piloted, drone capable of tagging enemies.
KILLSTREAKS_RECON_UGV_INCREASED_TIME_DES: Increases the amount of time the Recon Drone can be used.
KILLSTREAKS_RECON_UGV_STUN_DESC: Marking enemies will also flash them.
KILLSTREAKS_REMOTE_MG_TURRET_DESC: Toss a small turret and remotely control it.
KILLSTREAKS_REMOTE_TANK_DESC: Remote control an assault ground vehicle.
KILLSTREAKS_REMOTE_UAV_DESC: Control a Recon Drone, targeting enemies for your team.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_AI_DESC: Turret will be a sentry when not remote controlled.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_ANTI_INTRUSION_DESC: Turret will self-destruct if hacked by the enemy team.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_DESC: A deployable, manually controlled, high powered turret.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_ENERGY_DESC: Fires a controlled laser. Replaces Machine Gun or Rocket Turret.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_RIPPABLE_DESC: Adds ability to rip off the turret head and be carried on the battlefield.
KILLSTREAKS_SENTRY_ROCKET_DESC: Fires rockets. Replaces Machine Gun or Directed Energy Turret.
KILLSTREAKS_STRAFING_RUN_AIRSTRIKE_DESC: A manually targeted aerial bombing run.
KILLSTREAKS_SUPPORT_MODULE_DESC: Points earned towards this streak retain through death.
KILLSTREAKS_TEAM_AMMO_REFILL_DESC: Give everyone on your team an immediate ammo refill.
KILLSTREAKS_TRIPLE_UAV_DESC: Call in a Orbital Recon that shows the direction your enemy is facing.
KILLSTREAKS_UAV_ADVANCED_UPDATES_DESC: Faster position updating to the mini-map.
KILLSTREAKS_UAV_ASSIST_POINTS_DESC: Grants user additional assist points for every active kill.
KILLSTREAKS_UAV_DESC: Unmanned aerial vehicle that shows enemies on the mini-map.
KILLSTREAKS_UAV_ORBIT_DESC: Move UAV into orbit where it cannot be shot down.
KILLSTREAKS_UAV_PAINT_OUTLINE_DESC: Paints enemies with each sweep of the UAV.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_AI_ATTACK_DESC: AI controlled Warbird. Seeks out enemy targets.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_AI_FOLLOW_DESC: AI controlled Warbird. Stays near player providing cover fire.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_COOP_DESC: Joining player mounts additional MG Turret.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_DESC: A remotely piloted aerial attack vehicle.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_FLARES_DESC: Add an extra flare to ward off more enemy missiles.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_ROCKETS_DESC: Adds rockets as an alternate weapon.
KILLSTREAKS_WARBIRD_TIME_DESC: Increases Warbird time in the air.
